problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
hypothesis: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photonic. Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
